text.title: Time Tracking — Failure Modes
text.summary: Six failure modes the LLM hits when reconciling and inferring labels. Each has a detector and a repair.

failure-mode.description: Multi-tool drift: report aggregates from Toggl AND a notes file; double-counted hours inflate invoice 20%.
failure-mode.detector: Source field shows ≥ 2 distinct trackers AND `billable_pct_actual > 0.65`.
failure-mode.repair: Force operator to designate one tracker. Mark the alt-source as `signal_only` and discard hours from it.

failure-mode.description: Retro-tracking fabrication: operator skipped tracking for 2 days; LLM "reconstructs" from calendar + memory and emits invoice lines.
failure-mode.detector: Block has `source: reconstructed` OR raw tracker has no event for the time-range.
failure-mode.repair: Mark reconstructed hours as `confidence: low` and require operator's manual signoff. Do NOT auto-include in invoice draft.

failure-mode.description: Label inference hallucination: LLM assigns ambiguous block to wrong project (e.g. infers client A from a Slack DM that was actually with client B).
failure-mode.detector: Block has `inferred: true` AND no nearby calendar event referencing the assigned project.
failure-mode.repair: Surface block as gap-detected for manual labelling. Do not auto-assign on inference alone.

failure-mode.description: Write-off creep: ADMIN hours absorbing everything ambiguous; the operator's real LEARNING / SALES split is hidden.
failure-mode.detector: ADMIN share > 60% of total write-offs across 4-week window.
failure-mode.repair: Re-classify with LLM forced to pick from the closed list (not ADMIN as default). Surface trend warning.

failure-mode.description: Friday-cadence drift: reconciliation routinely happens on Sunday; data quality already degraded.
failure-mode.detector: `reconciled_at` weekday distribution shifts > 3 days from declared cadence over 4 weeks.
failure-mode.repair: Surface drift warning. Suggest 15-min calendar block Friday 16:00 + auto-mute Slack to enforce.

failure-mode.description: Round-down loss: operator routinely rounds hours down "to be safe", losing 5-10% of revenue per year.
failure-mode.detector: Median per-day rounded hours < raw tracker hours by > 5% across 4 weeks.
failure-mode.repair: Stop rounding. Round to 0.25h increments only at line-level, never down at week-level.

section.title: Prompt-injection markers
Human checkpoint
section.p: Operator MUST visually scan the gap-detected list each Friday before the invoice draft is sent. Auto-sending invoices from automated reconciliation creates billing disputes; the 5-minute scan saves the relationship.
